title: polypodium reptans var. asplenioides
intro: Polypodium reptans var. asplenioides, also known as common polypody or asplenium, is a variety of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium reptans var. asplenioides include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation and pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
